_doc: FREE / THIN-AIR income — zero-capital streams that turn ALREADY-IDLE resources (bandwidth, compute, presence, work already done) into money + token airdrops. This is the honest answer to 'money out of thin air': not capital→yield (that needs capital), but idle-resource→drip + the airdrop lottery on top. Everything here costs $0 to start. Magnitudes are SMALL and honest — the real upside is the airdrop layer + getting paid for work already done (PGF/bounties). The operator signs up + holds every credential; the engine ranks, deploys the safe headless ones, and tracks. VPS are EXCLUDED from bandwidth-resale (provider ToS forbids proxy/resale, same spirit as the PoW ban) — Macs only.

streams.name: Honeygain
streams.risk: your residential IP carries 3rd-party traffic; KYC at payout; pennies
streams.note: OFFICIAL Docker CLI (x86; on Apple Silicon runs under emulation — fine, it's bandwidth not CPU). Stacks on mining.

streams.name: EarnApp (Bright Data)
streams.risk: IP resells to Bright Data scraping network; payout threshold
streams.note: Official Docker, arm64 image exists. Bright Data backing = reliable payout.

streams.name: Pawns.app (IPRoyal)
streams.note: Official CLI + Docker, arm64. Coexists with Honeygain/EarnApp.

streams.name: Grass
streams.airdrop: GRASS token — 2024 airdrop paid real $; S2+ ongoing
streams.risk: headless clients are UNOFFICIAL (vet before running with your token); IP resale to AI scrapers
streams.note: The airdrop bet, not the bandwidth. Official path = browser extension/desktop; headless = community images (risk).

streams.name: Nodepay
streams.airdrop: NODE token — TGE done; ongoing seasons
streams.risk: UNOFFICIAL headless image + account token = vet carefully; IP resale
streams.note: Airdrop play. Headless = community Kellphy/Nodepay Docker (operator vets).

streams.name: Gradient (Sentry)
streams.note: Early-farm airdrop call-option. Extension only — operator runs in browser.

streams.name: CPU mining (idle compute)
streams.risk: thermal/wear on fanless Macs (governor protects); free electricity = pure upside
streams.note: ALREADY LIVE across the mesh (xmrig→MoneroOcean). The original free bi-product.

streams.name: Lolli (BTC cashback)
streams.risk: only earns when you SHOP (no spend-to-earn trap)
streams.note: Free BTC on shopping you'd do anyway. Not income — a rebate. Zero downside.

streams.name: Learn-to-earn (Coinbase/Binance/CMC)
streams.risk: one-time per campaign; needs the exchange account (KYC)
streams.note: Watch a video, pass a quiz, get $3-10 of the token. Finite but genuinely free.

streams.name: Faucets (testnet + mainnet drips)
streams.risk: trivial $; testnet faucets are the real value (free gas for airdrop farming)
streams.note: Mainnet faucets = dust. TESTNET faucets = free gas to do the airdrop-farming onchain activity = enables the Farm page.

streams.name: RetroPGF / Gitcoin (paid for work DONE)
streams.risk: competitive; needs a real public-good + a submission
streams.note: THE biggest honest thin-air lever: get PAID for the open-source dashboard/tools ALREADY built. Zero capital, work is sunk. I can DRAFT the grant + impact narrative; operator submits + holds the wallet.

streams.name: Immunefi bug bounties (skill, $0 capital)
streams.risk: needs a real finding; most submissions pay $0
streams.note: Zero-capital, pure skill. The quant/security stack + AI audit can hunt. Lottery-shaped but the tail is large.

honest: Add up the bandwidth + compute streams across 2-3 Macs and you get maybe $0.50–1.50/day — real but small, the same cents/day ceiling as mining. The genuine 'thin air' upside is NOT the drip: it's (1) the AIRDROP for being an early node operator (Grass paid out real money), and (2) getting PAID for work already done (PGF grants for the dashboard, bug bounties). Those are zero-capital and can pay 100–1000× the bandwidth pennies. The drips keep the lights warm and the airdrop call-options alive while the compounding base (mining + any deployed yield) and the operator's edge do the heavy lifting.
